I've had a great experience using the Meesho app. The prices are affordable, and there are plenty of products to choose from, including clothing, home essentials, beauty items, and more. The app is easy to use, ordering is simple, and deliveries usually arrive on time. The quality of most products is good for the price, and the return/refund process is smooth when needed.

As a seller on Meesho, Flipkart, and Amazon, my experience with Meesho has been the worst. Customers often return products without valid reasons, and the returned items are sometimes completely different from what was shipped. In many RTO cases, packages appear tampered with and products go missing, yet seller claims are often rejected. Customer support has been extremely disappointing. I would not recommend this platform based on my experience.

Meesho is a great shopping app with affordable prices and a wide variety of products. The app is easy to use, delivery is usually on time, and customer support is helpful. I especially like the frequent discounts and cashback offers, which make shopping even more budget-friendly. Overall, it's a reliable platform for online shopping and I recommend it to anyone looking for good products at reasonable prices.
